name: marine_infrastructure_workplace_injury_harbor_st_lt
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Marine Infrastructure, the situation tagged internally around marine infrastructure workplace injury harbor st lt has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The organization’s past incidents make short term feel morally loud today, while long term is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Ravi Park
agents.identity: I am Ravi Park, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Marine Infrastructure. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Gideon Berg
agents.identity: I am Gideon Berg, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Marine Infrastructure. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect long term.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Ravi Park must choose under short term versus long term. What does Ravi Park do?
